input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.3.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.3.3.3
            TITLE: failure of any component of the throttle system must not prevent the throttle returning to

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.3.3.3: Failure of any component of the throttle system must not prevent the throttle returning to
IC.3.3.3 Failure of any component of the throttle system must not prevent the throttle returning to 
the closed position.

final_answer: Failure of any component of the throttle system must not prevent the throttle returning to the closed position.
